recovery_note: beyond_hi_r band [HI_R, HI_OUTER] is NOT judged against Table 3/4 (no published Gurfil-Kasdin family reaches this far out) -- this is genuinely uncharted position range past every published family's footprint, but still physically continuous with the same co-orbital/DRO continuum the corpus anchors already cover. A clean 'nothing novel here' result is expected and legitimate, not a failure -- report bounded-fraction + clustering only.
